# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: PASS

**Test:** CORS: dangerous methods blocked without proper origin
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:24.610Z
**OWASP Category:** API7:2023 - Server Side Request Forgery

## Description

CORS blocked dangerous PUT requests from the untrusted origin.

## Why this result

Passed because CORS blocked dangerous PUT requests from the untrusted origin.
